## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm test:e2e` when runtime/user-facing behavior changes
- [ ] Self-host compose config check when Docker/env files change

## Release Impact

- [ ] Self-host setup
- [ ] Public images
- [ ] Database schema or migrations
- [ ] Scene bundle compatibility
- [ ] Room/API contracts
- [ ] Staging deployment
- [ ] Upgrade or rollback behavior
- [ ] No release impact
